description_long: This house features a steeply pitched red-tiled gable roof with dormer windows and a prominent brick chimney on one side. The exterior walls are painted white, complemented by green window shutters and a matching front door. The front facade includes a bay window with decorative greenery and a paved walkway leading to the entrance. On one side, a small fenced garden area with a tree and shrubs adds charm, while the rear includes a patio space with outdoor furniture. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front, with a mix of standard and bay styles, and the house is surrounded by a low white picket fence. The overall design is reminiscent of a traditional American suburban home with cottage influences.
description: A white house with a steep red-tiled gable roof, green shutters, bay windows, and a brick chimney, surrounded by a picket fence and garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, bay window, green shutters, and walkway leading up to the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain white wall with two windows and the extension of the walkway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, outdoor furniture, and garden with a tree and white fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the brick chimney, dormer windows, and a glimpse of the garden area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with bay windows and dormers
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a single door, small overhang, bay window, and paved walkway, accented by greenery.
